title: Vocabulary
purpose: Drill meaning and production for the exact lexical packs from the notes.
uiSignature: Pack chips across the top, simple word card in the middle, optional phrase strip below for phraseGuided stage.
subdeckRules: Keep packs semantically tight; do not mix random categories in early stages.
The adult slang/profanity pack is opt-in and hidden by default.

atoms.en: to walk / go for a walk

atoms.note: The notes only show the homograph плачу; do not drill this unless desired.

atoms.en: the weather is not very good
